The '''Chatos Academy''' was one of the many ancient and semi-legendary organizations which studied [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in the time before the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Originating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Palawa]], the Chatos Academy was believed by some historians to be a forerunner to, or at least an influence on, early Jedi teachings.

==History==
Established on the planet [[Palawa]]<ref name="TEA" /> before the dawn of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] or the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], the Chatos Academy led its students in the study of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The Academy's graduates were known as [[Paladin]]s<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> and became part of an order which some historians concluded may have influenced the idea of monastic [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] several centuries later.<ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] had records of the Chatos Academy in [[990 BBY]],<ref name="The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force real-life book">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref> as did the personal collection of [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]] in [[67 BBY/Legends|67 BBY]].<ref name="Darth Plagueis novel">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] of the script for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], [[Leia (The Star Wars)|Leia]] leaves the [[Palace of Lite]] to study at the "Academy at Chathos", which is located in a place called [[Yuell]] on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]. Her studies are cut short by the attack of the [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|Galactic Empire]], and she is rescued by [[Annikin Starkiller]]. One of her [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]] stays at the Academy as a decoy. The "Academy at Chathos" is also called the "Academy of Chathos" in one instance.<ref name="Rough Draft">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/the-star-wars-rough-draft|text=''The Star Wars: Rough Draft''|work=[https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller Starkiller — The Jedi Bendu Script Site]|archivedate=20240601042406}}</ref> In the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]], Aquilae was renamed [[Townowi]], but the Academy at Chathos is unchanged.<ref name="First Draft">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/the-star-wars-revised-first-draft|text=''The Star Wars: First Draft''|work=[https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller Starkiller — The Jedi Bendu Script Site]|archivedate=20240904070909}}</ref> ''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'' misspelled Chathos as Chatos.<ref name="Annotated">''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]''</ref>
